mapper.select: SELECT korean, hanja, meaning FROM hanja_dic WHERE korean = #{korean} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hanja_dic (korean, hanja, meaning) VALUES (#{korean}, #{hanja}, #{meaning}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO hanja_dic (korean, hanja, meaning) VALUES
(#{item.korean}, #{item.hanja}, #{item.meaning})
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
